{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is a prosthetic replacement for his right limb, which was severed at the elbow by [[Jai Long]]. The arm is a skeletal, bone-white limb that possesses its own independent will and a profound, insatiable hunger for [[madra]]. Because it is made from [[Remnant]] components, the limb can behave autonomously, sometimes acting without [[Lindon]]'s command or attempting to devour objects and entities in its vicinity. It has been known to pass through solid matter like a ghost, requiring [[Lindon]] to use specific [[madra]] to maintain its physical presence. To manage the limb, [[Lindon]] utilizes various methods of control, including scripting, [[halfsilver]] rings to restrict its power, and hunger bindings taken from [[dreadbeasts]] for maintenance and repair. While the arm provides significant combat utility—such as acting as a shield, seizing enemies, or utilizing specialized techniques—it also poses a risk to [[Lindon]]'s own spirit and stability. The arm is constructed from [[Gold]]-stage components, meaning it is not designed to withstand the stresses of an [[Underlord]] transition. Despite its utility, [[Lindon]] must constantly exert willpower to prevent the limb from consuming his own [[essence]] or acting out of turn.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm]] can catch and drain energy from metal spheres.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] grabbed for the gem with his [[Remnant]] arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] struck with his [[Remnant]] arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses his [[Remnant hand]] to grab [[Kiro's armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Force]] [[madra]] rushed through [[Lindon's Remnant arm]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant]] arm that twitches with disorder in his spirit.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is a limb that can consume spiritual energy.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is a part of his body that requires less maintenance than a normal [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] takes most of its sustenance from his [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant hand]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s arm possesses hunger.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
